topStories.title: Suspension of 8 Opposition MPs to be revoked? Matter to come up in Lok Sabha on March 17
topStories.description: The seven Congress MPs and a CPI(M) member were suspended for the entire Budget session over ‘unruly behaviour.’

topStories.title: The US-Israeli strategy against Iran is working. Here is why
topStories.description: Every aspect of Iran’s ability to project regional power is being successfully degraded.

topStories.title: US severe weather alert: Schools close in Virginia, Charlotte; DC alters schedules
topStories.description: Severe weather warnings prompted school closures in parts of Virginia and schedule changes in the Charlotte region, while several D.C.-area schools shifted to early dismissal or remote learning.

topStories.title: South Korean protesters criticise Trump over Hormuz security demand
topStories.description: Activists in South Korea have staged a protest against Donald Trump’s request for help securing the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: China Sees US-Iran War As Both Warning And Opportunity: Fareed Zakaria
dailyNews.description: The images from the war in the Middle East are being watched carefully in Beijing not with alarm, but with calculation.

dailyNews.title: Hormuz Disruption: India Says Not Engaged In Bilateral Talks With US Amid Trump's Appeal
dailyNews.description: MEA spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal's remarks came in response to a question on whether the US had approached India to send its warships to the region.

dailyNews.title: MEA clarifies India hasn't engaged in bilateral talks with US amid Trump's call to deploy warships to Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: India clarified that it has not engaged in bilateral talks with the US about ensuring safe passage for merchant ships through the Strait of Hormuz. The statement follows US President Trump's calls for nations to deploy warships to keep the crucial maritime corridor open.

dailyNews.title: Iran officials tout ‘Trump-burning’ celebration amid battle of narratives
dailyNews.description: Iranian state media calls for turning fire festival into a symbolic protest by burning figures of Trump and Netanyahu.

dailyNews.title: EU leaders reject military involvement in Strait of Hormuz amid war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Pushback comes as US President Donald Trump says NATO allies should help secure key waterway amid soaring oil prices.

dailyNews.title: One of USA's largest meatpacking plants goes on strike: 3,800 workers walk out, allege unfair labour practices — Details
dailyNews.description: Around 3,800 workers at Swift Beef Co. in Colorado initiated a strike, marking the first walkout at a U.S. beef slaughterhouse since the 1980s. Union officials allege unfair labor practices by JBS USA amid contract negotiations as beef prices rise amidst a low U.S. cattle population.

dailyNews.title: Olivia Dunne stresses as she watches Paul Skenes get out of jam at World Baseball Classic
dailyNews.description: Champion gymnast Olivia Dunne showed just how nervous she was watching her boyfriend, Paul Skenes, work out of a jam in the World Baseball Classic.

dailyNews.title: Google Gemini declares only GOP senators violate hate speech policy, zero Democrats, author claims
dailyNews.description: Author Wynton Hall claims that Gemini characterized several Republican senators' rhetoric as hate speech, but did not find anything objectionable from Democrats.

dailyNews.title: Sean Duffy urges Democrats to 'come to their senses' as TSA squeeze cripples airport operations
dailyNews.description: Transportation secretary blames Democrats for airport chaos as TSA workers quit amid DHS shutdown, causing major security delays during spring break.

dailyNews.title: Trump wants Judge Boasberg removed from cases after series of rulings
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump blasted Judge James Boasberg and asserted that he should be yanked off of cases related to his administration.

dailyNews.title: Blue state proposal targets Trump-era ICE hires, banning them from joining local police forces
dailyNews.description: Rhode Island Democrats propose banning police from hiring Trump-era ICE agents, escalating state pushback against federal immigration enforcement.

dailyNews.title: NFL Draft prospect suggests racial component behind getting asked to switch from QB position
dailyNews.description: Former Arkansas star quarterback Taylen Green opened up about why he refuses to consider switching positions for the NFL and suggested a racial component behind being asked.

dailyNews.title: How debit card fraud can happen without using the card
dailyNews.description: A fraud attempt on a never-used debit card reveals a surprising way criminals can exploit card numbers digitally without physical access.

dailyNews.title: Conan O'Brien swipes at TPUSA, Kid Rock during monologue with 'alternate Oscars' joke
dailyNews.description: Conan O'Brien roasted Kid Rock and Turning Point USA during his Oscars monologue on Sunday, joking about an "alternate" awards show being hosted by the group.

dailyNews.title: George Clooney accused of ‘strip-mining Americana for cash’ with beer launch after move to France: expert
dailyNews.description: George Clooney's new beer brand Crazy Mountain uses cowboy imagery and "Made in America" branding, drawing scrutiny as the star builds his life in France.

dailyNews.title: Amazon's Big Spring Sale hasn’t started yet — but these early deals are live right now
dailyNews.description: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale runs March 25–31. Shop early deals on tech, clothing, kitchen gadgets and more before the sale even begins.

dailyNews.title: WWE star Bayley reveals what Triple H told her about Women's Intercontinental Championship ahead of creation
dailyNews.description: WWE star Bayley opened up about the formation of the Women's Intercontinental Championship ahead of her match against AJ Lee on "Monday Night Raw."

dailyNews.title: Americans know Iran is our enemy. It’s time establishment politicians agreed
dailyNews.description: Iran funds terrorist groups like Hezbollah and Hamas and attacks U.S. forces, yet establishment Washington treats Tehran as diplomatic partner rather than threat.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Threat to Delay Summit With Xi Casts New Shadow Over China Relations
dailyNews.description: President Trump warned that he could postpone a meeting set to begin in just over two weeks if China refuses to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump Asks for Help With Strait of Hormuz, and Israeli Forces Kill Family in West Bank
dailyNews.description: Plus, highlights from the Oscars.

dailyNews.title: With Iran War, Trump Risks Stepping on Gains From His Own Tax Cuts
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s war in Iran has raised some costs just as many Americans are starting to see savings from last year’s tax cuts.

dailyNews.title: Professors Are Changing What They Teach, Even Far from Trump’s Gaze
dailyNews.description: Harvard is the White House’s biggest target, but professors all over the country have been censoring themselves, avoiding provocative topics and rewriting grants.

dailyNews.title: Iran war keeps Strait of Hormuz paralyzed and oil prices over $100
dailyNews.description: Iran war could escalate further as Trump threatens to hit key oil infrastructure if Tehran doesn't drop its chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: White House urges allies to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt told CBS News' Nancy Cordes that President Trump has a right to ask allies for help with reopening the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Charlie D'Agata, Imtiaz Tyab and Nancy Cordes have more.

dailyNews.title: Lawmakers react to Pentagon sending 5,000 more troops to Middle East
dailyNews.description: The Pentagon is sending 5,000 more service members to the Middle East amid lawmakers' concerns and frustrations over the Trump administration's lack of congressional approval before striking Iran. CBS News' Nikole Killion has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Key details on Iran war as Trump urges allies to help at the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump is urging U.S. allies to help keep peace at the Strait of Hormuz as the global supply chain faces challenges during the Iran war. CBS News' Ramy Inocencio reports, and retired Rear Adm. Mark Montgomery, the senior director at the Foundation for Defense of Democracies, has more insight. Also, Olivia Rinaldi has more on President Trump's latest comments.

dailyNews.title: US Jet Fighters Target Iran’s Kharg Island Oil Hub
dailyNews.description: Iran launched new attacks on Monday striking a fuel depot at Dubai’s airport and unleashing cluster bombs on Tel Aviv. Meanwhile, the Pentagon said it destroyed Kharg Island’s defenses, just off the Iranian coast, which produces 90% of Iran’s oil. President Donald Trump said he could go further and target the oil facilities themselves. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls U.S. operations in Iran 'a little excursion'
dailyNews.description: Trump calls U.S. operations in Iran 'a little excursion'

dailyNews.title: U.S. is allowing Iranian oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz, says Bessent
dailyNews.description: The White House believes tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will increase before Navy escorts are deployed, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices fall as Trump pressures allies to help protect tankers in Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: The U.S. strikes on Kharg Island and Trump's threat to hit Iran's oil infrastructure mark a major escalation in the war, according to JPMorgan.
